clear_overrides.name: Clear overrides
clear_overrides.description: Clear overrides and return to self-use mode. If mode is specified, only overrides of that mode are removed.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Only clear overrides of this mode. If not set, all overrides are cleared.

force_charge.name: Force charge
force_charge.description: Force the inverter to charge the battery for the specified duration, replacing any existing force-charge overrides while retaining others. Aborts if the new window conflicts with a different mode.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to force charge (max 4 hours, must not cross midnight).

power.name: Power limit
power.description: Charge power limit in watts. Defaults to inverter rated power if not set.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start the override. Defaults to now if not set.

force_discharge.name: Force discharge
force_discharge.description: Force the inverter to discharge the battery for the specified duration, replacing any existing force-discharge overrides while retaining others. Aborts if the new window conflicts with a different mode.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to force discharge (max 4 hours, must not cross midnight).

min_soc.name: Minimum SoC
min_soc.description: Stop discharging when the battery reaches this state of charge (%).

power.name: Power limit
power.description: Discharge power limit in watts. Defaults to inverter rated power if not set.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start the override. Defaults to now if not set.

user.title: FoxESS Control
user.description: Enter your FoxESS Cloud API credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to FoxESS Cloud API. Check your API key and serial number.
